productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Karnel Jeans Kidswear
description: CompositionLight blue denim jeans made of 100% cotton, with dark blue stitch detailing, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back and with an elasticated waistFittingRegular47 cm (18-24 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one up and about in a pair of jeans that play as hard as he does from gini and jony. Team this with a white tee and crocs footwear when you take him out next time, while the soft cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
